summary: First iteration testing of RunHub Italian running app. Backend: 18/22 tests passed (82%). Frontend: All core flows working. AI generation endpoint has external API timeout issues.

critical.issue: Returns 502 - AI service (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM) timing out with BadGatewayError. This is an external API issue, not a code bug. Backend logs show: 'litellm.BadGatewayError: BadGatewayError: OpenAIException - Error code: 502'

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 timeout during test run - may be transient
Test false positive - test_auth_me_without_token expected 401 but got 200 because session had cookies from previous test. Backend code is correct.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode.' - React Native deprecation warning
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - React Native deprecation warning

action_items: Investigate Emergent LLM API 502 errors - may need to increase timeout or add retry logic
Fix React Native deprecation warnings (resizeMode, pointerEvents)
Consider adding retry logic for AI generation endpoint
Update backend test to use fresh session for test_auth_me_without_token
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ API correctly uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
✓ Auth implementation correct: JWT with Bearer token + httpOnly cookies
✓ MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses
✓ Admin seeded idempotently with password hash update
✓ All step types implemented: warmup, run, recovery, sprint, walk, stretching, gymnastics
✓ Dark theme with sportive energetic design as requested
seed_data_creation: Admin user (admin@runhub.com / admin123) seeded automatically on backend startup. Test users created during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI generation endpoint has external API timeout issues (Emergent LLM returning 502). This is not a code bug but an infrastructure/integration issue. All other endpoints working correctly. Frontend fully functional with all features tested.
rca_of_issue:
AI Generation 502 Error RCA:

Root Cause: External Emergent LLM API (Claude Sonnet 4.5) returning 502 BadGatewayError after multiple retries.

Reproduction Steps:
1. Login as premium user (admin@runhub.com)
2. POST /api/plans/ai-generate with valid payload
3. Backend calls LlmChat with Claude Sonnet 4.5 model
4. After ~3 minutes of retries, returns 502

Backend Logs:
- 'openai._base_client - INFO - Retrying request to /chat/completions in 0.466881 seconds'
- 'openai._base_client - INFO - Retrying request to /chat/completions in 0.990678 seconds'
- 'server - ERROR - AI generate error: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadGatewayError: BadGatewayError: OpenAIException - Error code: 502'

Mitigation:
- Add timeout configuration to LlmChat (currently using default)
- Add user-facing error message explaining AI service is temporarily unavailable
- Consider fallback to cached/template plans if AI fails
- Monitor Emergent LLM API status
